answer:
Firecrawl uses Bearer token authentication for its API [1][2]. Every request must include an Authorization header containing your API key [1][2].

Format:
`Authorization: Bearer fc-YOUR-API-KEY`

You can obtain your key from the Firecrawl dashboard [1][2]. For programmatic usage, you can pass the key directly to the Firecrawl SDK class or set it as the FIRECRAWL_API_KEY environment variable [3]. AI agents may alternatively use WorkOS ID-JAG identity assertions to register and receive credentials for API access [4].

results.title: Curl Source of Truth - Firecrawl Docs
